wxca.name: Environment and Climate Change Canada Weather

endpoints.name: Search Weather Canada Locations
endpoints.description: Find Weather Canada city-page forecast locations. Use q for a city or community name when supported by the API. A bbox can instead restrict results geographically. Returns only the feature id, name, region, and coordinates for each match (not the full weather record); pass a selected id to city_get. For ambiguous names, inspect name and region before choosing.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Free-text location search, such as Ottawa, Montréal, Saint John, or Yellowknife. If the server does not support free-text search for this collection, use bbox or city_list instead.

parameters.name: bbox
parameters.description: Optional bounding box as west,south,east,north in longitude/latitude (EPSG:4326), for example -75.9,45.2,-75.4,45.6 for the Ottawa area.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of matching locations to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Zero-based result offset for paging.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Metadata language.

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Force GeoJSON/JSON output.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: Restrict returned feature properties to keep responses small. Defaults to name and region only.

endpoints.name: List Weather Canada Locations
endpoints.description: List Weather Canada city-page locations and their feature IDs. Use this when free-text search is unavailable or when resolving an ambiguous place name. Page with limit and offset, then call city_get with the chosen feature ID.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of locations to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Zero-based result offset.

parameters.name: bbox
parameters.description: Optional west,south,east,north bounding box in longitude/latitude.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Metadata language.

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Force GeoJSON/JSON output.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: Restrict returned feature properties to keep responses small. Defaults to name and region only.

endpoints.name: Get Current Weather Conditions
endpoints.description: Get only the compact English current observations for one forecast-location feature ID, such as on-118 or qc-147: temperature, condition, wind direction/speed/gust, wind chill, humidity, dewpoint, pressure, station, observation time, and any active warnings. No forecast is included; use city_get for the 7-day day/night outlook or city_hourly for the next 24 hours.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Weather Canada city-page feature ID returned by city_search or city_list, for example on-118, qc-147, bc-74, or ns-19.

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Force GeoJSON/JSON output.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: English current-conditions fields. Static; keeps the response small.

endpoints.name: Get Current Weather and 7-Day Forecast
endpoints.description: Get a compact English city-page weather record for one forecast-location feature ID, such as on-118 or qc-147. Returns current observations (temperature, condition, wind, gust, humidity, dewpoint, pressure, wind chill, station, observation time) and the official day/night forecast periods covering about seven days (forecast text plus high/low temperatures), with sunrise/sunset and any active warnings. Hourly forecasts are not included here; use city_hourly for those.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Weather Canada city-page feature ID returned by city_search or city_list, for example on-118, qc-147, bc-74, or ns-19.

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Force GeoJSON/JSON output.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: English current-conditions and 7-day forecast fields. Static; keeps the response small.

endpoints.name: Get Hourly Forecast
endpoints.description: Get the compact English hourly forecast for one forecast-location feature ID, such as on-118 or qc-147. Returns each upcoming hour with its UTC timestamp, condition, temperature (C), chance of precipitation (lop, %), humidex, and wind speed/direction. Use city_get for current conditions and the 7-day day/night outlook.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Weather Canada city-page feature ID returned by city_search or city_list, for example on-118, qc-147, bc-74, or ns-19.

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Force GeoJSON/JSON output.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: English hourly forecast fields. Static; keeps the response small.

endpoints.name: Find Forecast Locations Near Coordinates
endpoints.description: Find Weather Canada city-page forecast locations near known coordinates. Supply a small west,south,east,north bounding box around the point. Select the closest returned feature by geometry, then call city_get with its ID.

parameters.name: bbox
parameters.description: Required bounding box as west,south,east,north in longitude/latitude. For a point, start with roughly ±0.5 degrees and widen if no location is returned.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum nearby forecast locations.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Metadata language.

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Force GeoJSON/JSON output.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: Restrict returned feature properties to keep responses small. Defaults to name and region only; geometry is still returned so you can pick the closest location.

endpoints.name: Get Weather Canada City-Page Schema
endpoints.description: Return the current schema for the experimental city-page weather collection. Use this to interpret fields or diagnose upstream schema changes.

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Force JSON output.
